tasks.title: Initialize project structure
tasks.description: Create package.json, tsconfig.json, and project folder structure.
tasks.success_criteria: package.json and tsconfig.json exist

tasks.title: Create .env configuration
tasks.description: Setup 20 environment variables: NODE_ENV, PORT, API_URL, FRONTEND_URL, JWT_SECRET, ... (+15 more)
tasks.success_criteria: .env and .env.example files created

tasks.title: Configure 10 secrets
tasks.description: User input needed for: JWT_SECRET, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD, S3_ACCESS_KEY, S3_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
tasks.success_criteria: All required secrets configured in .env

tasks.title: Configure database connection
tasks.description: Setup DATABASE_URL in .env and run initial Prisma setup.
tasks.success_criteria: Prisma initialized and DATABASE_URL configured

tasks.title: Create Docker configuration
tasks.description: Generate docker-compose.yml with all required services (database, redis, etc.).
tasks.success_criteria: docker-compose.yml created with all services

tasks.title: Install dependencies
tasks.description: Run npm install for all required packages.
tasks.success_criteria: node_modules created, no npm install errors

tasks.title: Create Prisma model: AuthMethod
tasks.description: Define AuthMethod model in prisma/schema.prisma with all required attributes and types.
tasks.success_criteria: Prisma model defined with all attributes, correct types, and @id field; User can: enable and use optional two-factor authentication with a 6-digit PIN; User can: mich per Fingerabdruck oder Face ID entsperren; User can: sign in using a passkey instead of a password; Address: Fehlerfälle definieren (Retry-Strategien, Sperrung nach Fehlversuchen, Fallback-Kanäle, eindeutige Fehlermeldungen).; Address: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung

diagrams.content:
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
C4Context
    title Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung System Context

    Person(customer, "Kunde", "Ein Benutzer, der sich anmelden möchte.")
    System(system, "Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung System", "Ein System, das optionale 2FA mit 6-stelliger PIN unterstützt.")
    System_Ext(authenticationService, "Authentifizierungsdienst", "Ein externer Dienst zur Verifizierung von Anmeldedaten.")

    Rel(customer, system, "Verwendet")
    Rel(system, authenticationService, "Sendet Anmeldedaten zur Verifizierung")
    Rel(authenticationService, system, "Sendet Bestätigung

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Ist 2FA aktiviert?}
    B -- Ja --> C[Benutzer gibt 6-stellige PIN ein]
    B -- Nein --> D[2FA aktivieren]
    D --> C
    C --> E{Ist die PIN korrekt?}
    E -- Ja --> F[Zugriff gewährt]
    E -- Nein --> G[Zugriff verweigert]
    G --> H[Benutzer erneut versuchen]
    H --> C

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as Benutzer
    participant System as System
    participant Authenticator as Authenticator

    Benutzer->>System: Anmelden
    System->>Benutzer: Sende 6-stellige PIN zur Bestätigung
    Benutzer->>Authenticator: Generiere 6-stellige PIN
    Authenticator-->>Benutzer: 6-stellige PIN
    Benutzer->>System: Eingabe der 6-stelligen PIN
    System->>System: Überprüfe PIN
    alt PIN korrekt
        System-->>Benutzer: Zugang gewährt
    else PIN falsch
        System-->>Benutzer: Zugang verweigert
    end

known_gaps.title: Fehlende Fehlerbehandlung bei Registrierung/Verifizierung
known_gaps.suggestion: Fehlerfälle definieren (Retry-Strategien, Sperrung nach Fehlversuchen, Fallback-Kanäle, eindeutige Fehlermeldungen).

known_gaps.title: Fehlende Sicherheitsanforderungen
known_gaps.suggestion: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung hinzufügen.

user_story_details.title: Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung
user_story_details.description: As a registered user I want to enable and use optional two-factor authentication with a 6-digit PIN so that increase account security against unauthorized access
user_story_details.i_want: enable and use optional two-factor authentication with a 6-digit PIN
user_story_details.so_that: increase account security against unauthorized access

user_story_details.title: Biometrische Entsperrung
user_story_details.description: As a registrierter Benutzer I want to mich per Fingerabdruck oder Face ID entsperren so that um mich schneller und sicherer anzumelden, ohne mein Passwort eingeben zu muessen
user_story_details.i_want: mich per Fingerabdruck oder Face ID entsperren
user_story_details.so_that: um mich schneller und sicherer anzumelden, ohne mein Passwort eingeben zu muessen

user_story_details.title: Passkey-Unterstuetzung
user_story_details.description: As a registered user I want to sign in using a passkey instead of a password so that to access my account quickly and securely without remembering a password
user_story_details.i_want: sign in using a passkey instead of a password
user_story_details.so_that: to access my account quickly and securely without remembering a password

tasks.title: Create Prisma model: Device
tasks.description: Define Device model in prisma/schema.prisma with all required attributes and types.
tasks.success_criteria: Prisma model defined with all attributes, correct types, and @id field; User can: use the system concurrently on multiple devices; Address: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung; Address: Flows für Geräte hinzufügen/entfernen, Sync-Strategie und Konfliktauflösung definieren.

diagrams.content:
%%{ init : { "theme" : "default" } }%%
C4Context
    title Multi-Device Support System Architecture

    Person(user, "User", "A user who accesses the system from multiple devices.")
    
    System(multiDeviceSystem, "Multi-Device Support System", "Allows simultaneous usage on multiple devices.")

    System_Ext(device1, "Device 1", "First device used by the user.")
    System_Ext(device2, "Device 2", "Second device used by the user.")
    System_Ext(device3, "Device 3", "Third device used by the user.")

    Rel(user, device1, "Uses")
    Rel(user, device2, "Uses")
    Rel(user, device3, "Us

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant Device1 as Device 1
    participant Device2 as Device 2
    participant System as System

    User->>Device1: Initiates session
    Device1->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device1: Acknowledges connection

    User->>Device2: Initiates session
    Device2->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device2: Acknowledges connection

    Device1->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device1: Processes request

    Device2->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device2: Processes request

known_gaps.suggestion: Flows für Geräte hinzufügen/entfernen, Sync-Strategie und Konfliktauflösung definieren.

tasks.title: Create Prisma model: PhoneVerification
tasks.description: Define PhoneVerification model in prisma/schema.prisma with all required attributes and types.
tasks.success_criteria: Prisma model defined with all attributes, correct types, and @id field; User can: register with a mobile phone number and complete verification; Address: Fehlerfälle definieren (Retry-Strategien, Sperrung nach Fehlversuchen, Fallback-Kanäle, eindeutige Fehlermeldungen).; Address: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung

diagrams.content:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Unregistered
    Unregistered --> EnterPhoneNumber: Enter phone number
    EnterPhoneNumber --> PhoneNumberEntered
    PhoneNumberEntered --> SendVerificationCode: Send verification code
    SendVerificationCode --> WaitingForVerificationCode
    WaitingForVerificationCode --> VerifyCode: Enter verification code
    VerifyCode --> Verified: Code valid
    VerifyCode --> InvalidCode: Code invalid
    InvalidCode --> WaitingForVerificationCode: Retry
    Verified --> [*]

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Benutzer gibt Telefonnummer ein]
    B --> C[System sendet Verifizierungscode]
    C --> D[Benutzer erhält Verifizierungscode]
    D --> E[Benutzer gibt Verifizierungscode ein]
    E --> F{Ist der Code korrekt?}
    F -->|Ja| G[Benutzer registriert]
    F -->|Nein| H[Benutzer erhält Fehlermeldung]
    H --> D
    G --> I[Ende]

sequenceDiagram
    participant Benutzer as Benutzer
    participant System as System
    participant Verifizierungsdienst as Verifizierungsdienst

    Benutzer->>System: Telefonnummer eingeben
    System->>Benutzer: Bestätigungs-SMS senden
    Benutzer->>Verifizierungsdienst: Bestätigungscode eingeben
    Verifizierungsdienst-->>System: Bestätigungscode validieren
    System-->>Benutzer: Registrierung erfolgreich

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Initial
    Initial --> CodeEntered : Sicherheitscode eingegeben
    CodeEntered --> VerificationPending : Verifizierung ausstehend
    VerificationPending --> Verified : Verifizierung erfolgreich
    VerificationPending --> Failed : Verifizierung fehlgeschlagen
    Verified --> [*] : Zugriff gewährt
    Failed --> [*] : Zugriff verweigert

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Authentifizierung
    Authentifizierung --> AppSperre : Erfolgreiche Authentifizierung
    Authentifizierung --> [*] : Fehlgeschlagene Authentifizierung
    AppSperre --> Nachrichtensperre : Aktivierung der Nachrichtensperre
    Nachrichtensperre --> AppSperre : Deaktivierung der Nachrichtensperre
    Nachrichtensperre --> [*] : Rückkehr zur Hauptansicht

tasks.title: Controller: POST /api/v1/auth/2fa/setup
tasks.description:
Enable 2FA for the current user
Implement controller method with 0 parameters.
tasks.success_criteria: NestJS controller with correct decorators, DTOs, and route paths; User can: enable and use optional two-factor authentication with a 6-digit PIN; Address: Fehlerfälle definieren (Retry-Strategien, Sperrung nach Fehlversuchen, Fallback-Kanäle, eindeutige Fehlermeldungen).; Address: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung

diagrams.content:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as Benutzer
    participant System as System
    participant Authenticator as Authenticator

    Benutzer->>System: Anmelden
    System->>Benutzer: Sende 6-stellige PIN zur Bestätigung
    Benutzer->>Authenticator: Generiere 6-stellige PIN
    Authenticator-->>Benutzer: 6-stellige PIN
    Benutzer->>System: Eingabe der 6-stelligen PIN
    System->>System: Überprüfe PIN
    alt PIN korrekt
        System-->>Benutzer: Zugang gewährt
    else PIN falsch
        System-->>Benutzer: Zugang verweigert
    end

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Ist 2FA aktiviert?}
    B -- Ja --> C[Benutzer gibt 6-stellige PIN ein]
    B -- Nein --> D[2FA aktivieren]
    D --> C
    C --> E{Ist die PIN korrekt?}
    E -- Ja --> F[Zugriff gewährt]
    E -- Nein --> G[Zugriff verweigert]
    G --> H[Benutzer erneut versuchen]
    H --> C

%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
C4Context
    title Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung System Context

    Person(customer, "Kunde", "Ein Benutzer, der sich anmelden möchte.")
    System(system, "Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung System", "Ein System, das optionale 2FA mit 6-stelliger PIN unterstützt.")
    System_Ext(authenticationService, "Authentifizierungsdienst", "Ein externer Dienst zur Verifizierung von Anmeldedaten.")

    Rel(customer, system, "Verwendet")
    Rel(system, authenticationService, "Sendet Anmeldedaten zur Verifizierung")
    Rel(authenticationService, system, "Sendet Bestätigung

    participant User as User
    participant Device1 as Device 1
    participant Device2 as Device 2
    participant System as System

    Device1->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device1: Acknowledges connection

    User->>Device2: Initiates session
    Device2->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device2: Acknowledges connection

    Device1->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device1: Processes request

    Device2->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device2: Processes request

user_story_details.title: Multi-Device Support
user_story_details.description: As a registered user I want to use the system concurrently on multiple devices so that to stay productive and continue work seamlessly across devices
user_story_details.i_want: use the system concurrently on multiple devices
user_story_details.so_that: to stay productive and continue work seamlessly across devices

tasks.title: Service: DELETE /api/v1/sessions/current
tasks.description: Business logic for Logout current session
tasks.success_criteria: Service with Prisma CRUD operations, error handling, and proper return types; User can: use the system concurrently on multiple devices; Address: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung; Address: Flows für Geräte hinzufügen/entfernen, Sync-Strategie und Konfliktauflösung definieren.

diagrams.content:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant Device1 as Device 1
    participant Device2 as Device 2
    participant System as System

    User->>Device1: Initiates session
    Device1->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device1: Acknowledges connection

    User->>Device2: Initiates session
    Device2->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device2: Acknowledges connection

    Device1->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device1: Processes request

    Device2->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device2: Processes request

%%{ init : { "theme" : "default" } }%%
C4Context
    title Multi-Device Support System Architecture

    Person(user, "User", "A user who accesses the system from multiple devices.")
    
    System(multiDeviceSystem, "Multi-Device Support System", "Allows simultaneous usage on multiple devices.")

    System_Ext(device1, "Device 1", "First device used by the user.")
    System_Ext(device2, "Device 2", "Second device used by the user.")
    System_Ext(device3, "Device 3", "Third device used by the user.")

    Rel(user, device1, "Uses")
    Rel(user, device2, "Uses")
    Rel(user, device3, "Us

tasks.title: Controller: POST /api/v1/passkeys/registration/options
tasks.description:
Create passkey registration options
Implement controller method with 0 parameters.
tasks.success_criteria: NestJS controller with correct decorators, DTOs, and route paths; User can: sign in using a passkey instead of a password

diagrams.content:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as Benutzer
    participant System as System
    participant Auth as Authentifizierungsdienst

    User->>System: Anfrage zur passwortlosen Anmeldung
    System->>User: Bitte Passkey bereitstellen
    User->>System: Übermittlung des Passkeys
    System->>Authentifizierungsdienst: Validierung des Passkeys
    Authentifizierungsdienst-->>System: Bestätigung der Validierung
    System-->>User: Anmeldung erfolgreich

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[User initiates login]
    B --> C{Is Passkey available?}
    C -- Yes --> D[User selects Passkey]
    C -- No --> E[Prompt for alternative login]
    D --> F[Authenticate using Passkey]
    F --> G{Authentication successful?}
    G -- Yes --> H[Grant access to user]
    G -- No --> I[Show error message]
    E --> J[User enters credentials]
    J --> K[Authenticate using credentials]
    K --> L{Authentication successful?}
    L -- Yes --> H
    L -- No --> I
    I --> M[End]
    H --> M

%%{ init : { "theme" : "default" } }%%
C4Context
    title Passkey-Unterstuetzung System Architecture

    Person(user, "User", "A user who wants to log in without a password.")
    System(passkeySystem, "Passkey System", "A system that supports passwordless login via Passkeys.")
    System_Ext(authenticationService, "Authentication Service", "External service for authentication.")
    System_Ext(deviceManager, "Device Manager", "External service that manages user devices.")

    Rel(user, passkeySystem, "Uses")
    Rel(passkeySystem, authenticationService, "Authenticates using")
    Rel(passk

tasks.title: Test: Successful registration with valid phone number an
tasks.description:
Feature: Telefonnummer-Registrierung
Tags: smoke, regression, happy-path
Steps: 5
tasks.success_criteria: E2E test validating the complete happy-path user flow

enrichment_context.test_scenarios:
@@smoke @@regression
Feature: Telefonnummer-Registrierung
  As a new user
  I want to register with a mobile phone number and complete verification
  So that to securely create an account and access the system

  Background:
    Given the user is on the registration screen

  @@smoke @@regression @@happy-path
  Scenario: Successful registration with valid phone number and correct code
    # Verifies account creation when a valid unused phone number is submitted and the correct code is entered within the allowed time
    Given the user has an unused valid mobile phone number
    When the user submits the phone number
    And the user enters the correct verification code within the allowed time
    Then the account is created
    And the phone number is marked as verified
  # ... (truncated)

enrichment_context.test_scenarios:
@@smoke @@regression
Feature: Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung
  As a registered user
  I want to enable and use optional two-factor authentication with a 6-digit PIN
  So that increase account security against unauthorized access

  Background:
    Given the user is registered and logged in

  @@happy-path @@smoke @@regression
  Scenario: Enable 2FA with valid 6-digit PIN
    # Verifies that a user can enable 2FA with a valid PIN and it is required on next login
    Given the user has access to security settings
    When the user enables 2FA and verifies a valid 6-digit PIN
    Then 2FA is activated for the account
    And a 6-digit PIN is required for subsequent logins

  @@happy-path @@regression
  Scenario: Login with 2FA enabled and correct PIN
    # Ensures login suc
  # ... (truncated)

tasks.description:

Tags: smoke, regression, happy-path

tasks.success_criteria: E2E test validating the complete happy-path user flow

enrichment_context.test_scenarios:
@@smoke @@regression
Feature: Biometrische Entsperrung
  As a registrierter Benutzer
  I want to mich per Fingerabdruck oder Face ID entsperren
  So that um mich schneller und sicherer anzumelden, ohne mein Passwort eingeben zu muessen

  Background:
    Given der Benutzer ist registriert und die App ist installiert

  @@smoke @@regression @@happy-path
  Scenario Outline: Biometrische Entsperrung erfolgreich
    # Validiert die erfolgreiche Anmeldung mit Fingerabdruck oder Face ID
    Given biometrische Entsperrung ist in der App aktiviert
    And Biometrie ist auf dem Geraet eingerichtet
    When der Benutzer die App oeffnet
    Then wird der Benutzer per <biometrie_typ> authentifiziert
    And der Benutzer erhaelt Zugang zur App

    Examples:
      | biometrie_typ |

  # ... (truncated)

tasks.title: Test: Concurrent sessions remain active on two devices
tasks.description:
Feature: Multi-Device Support
Tags: happy-path, smoke, regression
Steps: 4
tasks.success_criteria: E2E test validating the complete happy-path user flow; User can: use the system concurrently on multiple devices; Address: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung; Address: Flows für Geräte hinzufügen/entfernen, Sync-Strategie und Konfliktauflösung definieren.

diagrams.content:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant Device1 as Device 1
    participant Device2 as Device 2
    participant System as System

    User->>Device1: Initiates session
    Device1->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device1: Acknowledges connection

    User->>Device2: Initiates session
    Device2->>System: Connects to system
    System-->>Device2: Acknowledges connection

    Device1->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device1: Processes request

    Device2->>System: Sends request
    System-->>Device2: Processes request

%%{ init : { "theme" : "default" } }%%
C4Context
    title Multi-Device Support System Architecture

    Person(user, "User", "A user who accesses the system from multiple devices.")
    
    System(multiDeviceSystem, "Multi-Device Support System", "Allows simultaneous usage on multiple devices.")

    System_Ext(device1, "Device 1", "First device used by the user.")
    System_Ext(device2, "Device 2", "Second device used by the user.")
    System_Ext(device3, "Device 3", "Third device used by the user.")

    Rel(user, device1, "Uses")
    Rel(user, device2, "Uses")
    Rel(user, device3, "Us

known_gaps.title: Fehlende Sicherheitsanforderungen
known_gaps.suggestion: NFRs zu Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung, Transportverschlüsselung, Session-Timeouts, Geräteverwaltung und Wiederherstellung hinzufügen.

known_gaps.title: Unvollständige User Journeys für Multi-Device
known_gaps.suggestion: Flows für Geräte hinzufügen/entfernen, Sync-Strategie und Konfliktauflösung definieren.

user_story_details.title: Multi-Device Support
user_story_details.description: As a registered user I want to use the system concurrently on multiple devices so that to stay productive and continue work seamlessly across devices
user_story_details.i_want: use the system concurrently on multiple devices
user_story_details.so_that: to stay productive and continue work seamlessly across devices

enrichment_context.test_scenarios:
@smoke @regression
Feature: Multi-Device Support
  As a registered user
  I want to use the system concurrently on multiple devices
  So that to stay productive and continue work seamlessly across devices

  Background:
    Given a registered user account exists with valid credentials

  @happy-path @smoke @regression
  Scenario: Concurrent sessions remain active on two devices
    # Validates that a user can log in on a second device without terminating the first session
    Given the user is authenticated and active on Device A
    When the user logs in on Device B with the same account
    Then both Device A and Device B sessions remain active
    And the user can navigate and perform actions on both devices

  @happy-path @regression
  Scenario: Actions from either 
  # ... (truncated)
